mapper.sql:
WHERE is_active = 'Y'
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND public_procurement_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND bid_contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND first_contract_date = #{firstCntrctDate}
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT contract_no AS contractNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, public_procurement_category_name AS detailItemName, bid_contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, contract_amount AS finalContractAmount, latest_change_seq AS contractCount, is_long_term_contract AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo FROM construction_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_no LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT contract_no AS contractNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, public_procurement_category_name AS detailItemName, bid_contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, contract_amount AS finalContractAmount, latest_change_seq AS contractCount, is_long_term_contract AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo FROM construction_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_no
mapper.sql:
WHERE is_active = 'Y'
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND public_procurement_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND bid_contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND initial_contract_date = #{firstCntrctDate}
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT group_key AS groupKey, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, public_procurement_category_name AS detailItemName, bid_contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, DATE_FORMAT(initial_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmount, final_change_seq AS contractCount, contract_count AS groupContractCount, is_long_term_contract AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM construction_contract_grouped
ORDER BY initial_contract_date DESC, group_key LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT group_key AS groupKey, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, public_procurement_category_name AS detailItemName, bid_contract_method AS contractMethod, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, DATE_FORMAT(initial_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmount, final_change_seq AS contractCount, contract_count AS groupContractCount, is_long_term_contract AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM construction_contract_grouped
ORDER BY initial_contract_date DESC, group_key
